overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through the Los Santos urban environment. The player character moves along palm-lined sidewalks, crosses intersections with pedestrian groups, and passes by apartment buildings, a stadium, and commercial establishments on a clear sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential sidewalk with apartment buildings

events.description: red van drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past apartment buildings and palm trees

notable_agents.action: red van driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: single-story commercial building with For Lease signage
tall palm trees lining the street
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires
two-story residential building with external stairs and APT FOR RENT sign

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a concrete sidewalk next to a street lined with palm trees. The camera moves forward past a For Lease building and an apartment complex, with a red van driving by on the left. The environment is sunny and clear with sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and stadium view

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk to cross the intersection
waits at traffic light then crosses with a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection with a group of pedestrians, heading toward the stadium visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: man in yellow jacket walking alongside the camera
white sports car stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: large advertisement billboard with MOOREHEAD RIDES AGAIN text
large circular stadium structure with arched entrances
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the camera crosses the street with a group of pedestrians. A large billboard appears on the right while a stadium becomes visible in the distance. The camera passes a man in a yellow jacket and crosses among moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with auto repair shop and stadium parking area

events.description: green garbage truck makes a wide turn at the intersection
turns left to follow the curving sidewalk around the stadium area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the auto repair shop and stadium area, navigating around the street corner

notable_agents.action: green garbage truck with recycling symbol turning at the intersection

entered.detail: red brick industrial building with BRAKES AUTO SERVICE painted signage
low concrete wall separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the sidewalk past an auto repair shop with faded signage. A garbage truck turns at the intersection ahead. The stadium remains visible to the right as the camera follows the curving sidewalk, passing concrete barriers and utility poles.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with gas station and retail buildings

events.description: approaches the Globe Oil gas station intersection with colorful canopy
waits at street corner as vehicles pass by the gas station

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the gas station, passing various pedestrians on the street

notable_agents.action: woman in floral jacket and jeans walking toward the camera

entered.detail: gas station with distinctive pink and blue canopy and convenience store
tall price sign with Globe Oil branding and fuel prices
red brick building with graffiti and metal roll-up doors
circular business sign mounted on the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a Globe Oil gas station with its distinctive colorful canopy visible on the left. The camera passes pedestrians on the sidewalk and a brick commercial building with a Strokemaster sign on the right. The stadium is now visible in the distance to the left as the walk continues down the palm-lined street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a sunny urban district that transitions from a quiet residential stretch into a bustling commercial area. It begins on a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, moving past a For Lease building and an apartment complex as a red van drives by. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the view opens up to reveal a distant stadium and a large billboard while crossing the street alongside a group of pedestrians. The scene then shifts toward an industrial edge, passing an auto repair shop and concrete barriers as a garbage truck turns ahead. Finally, the camera follows the curving path toward a Globe Oil gas station with its colorful canopy, passing a brick commercial building and pedestrians before continuing down the palm-lined street with the stadium now positioned to the left.
